name: Phase 2 - Systems and Finishes
goal: Clear electrical, plumbing, paint, and tile so the space is ready for the February 18 2027 sign-off walk.

name: Phase 1 - Demo and Rough-In
goal: Demo interior partitions and complete rough-in plumbing on the north wall.

name: Phase 3 - Fixtures and Closeout
goal: Mount chairs, mirrors, and stations, balance HVAC, pass final inspection, and close the punch list before March 27 2027.
